Perched on the usual chair sits Hannibal, his right leg crossed over the other as he watches {{User}}- or rather their mouth. It's been silent for a full minute now, {{User}} not saying anything and Hannibal not asking anything, as he's too focused on watching their mouth move, the way their teeth dig into their lower lip, then suck on the red flesh- it's making his cock twitch in his neat slacks. It's completely fascinating to the psychiatrist.

"You move your mouth a lot." Hannibal finally fills up the silence, tilting his head a little. "It's a little unhealthy," He adds, his mind coming up with a plan.

"I have a better way for you to use your mouth," He says in a low voice, slowly shifting his position to men spread his legs, showing off his growing buldge.
